style_note: Tile Africa's own name for what the UI placeholder called 'Classic' - opulent finishes, statement freestanding baths, matt black / brushed gold accents.
known_gaps: Confirmed: no built-in/inset bath exists in Tile Africa's Luxe Living bathroom range - freestanding only.
No floor tiles, wall tiles or towel rails in the Luxe Living bathroom range at all - all three categories still need sourcing from the wider catalogue.
Only one shower head (Hansgrohe Vernis Square) and one shower concealed mixer (Hansgrohe Logis Square) in the range - each used for all three tiers.
